label: Networking
documentation: Provides methods for fetching data from external URLs via HTTP requests.

label: fetch
documentation: Fetch data from the corresponding URL. Returns a NetworkResponse wrapping a DataReader.

label: fetch
documentation: Fetch data from the corresponding URL with custom Request Options (method, timeout, headers, body). Returns a NetworkResponse wrapping a DataReader.

label: NetworkResponse
documentation: A wrapper for the data and metadata returned from a Networking.fetch call.

label: getResponseCode
documentation: Get the HTTP Response Code (e.g., 200 for OK, 404 for Not Found).

label: success
documentation: Returns whether a response was received from the server. Note: Use .ok() to check if the status code is in the 200-299 range.

label: ok
documentation: Returns true if the response code is within the 200-299 range.

label: getData
documentation: Obtain the fetched data as a DataReader. Returns null if the request failed.

label: exception
documentation: Returns the relevant Java Exception if the request failed, or null if it succeeded.

label: getHeaders
documentation: Obtain the headers returned in the HTTP response. Returns null if the request failed.
